Container.Name: isputnik
Container.Overview: Private self-hosted family audiobook app. On first run, open the web UI to create an admin account.

Config.Name: Config & Data
Config.Description: Stores the database, thumbnails, and metadata. Keep this on your appdata share.

Config.Name: Audiobooks
Config.Description: Path to your audiobook library. Add this path as a storage root inside the app.

Config.Name: App URL
Config.Description: The URL you use to open the app in your browser. Used for CORS — must match exactly (IP or domain, including port).

Config.Name: Cookie Secure
Config.Description: Set to true only if you access the app over HTTPS (e.g. behind a reverse proxy with SSL). Leave false for plain HTTP.

Config.Name: Session Length (days)
Config.Description: How many days a login session stays valid.

Config.Name: Invite Validity (days)
Config.Description: How many days an invite link remains active.
